headline: Is Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CCI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Crown Castle Inc. on The Mispricing Desk’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CCI. Crown Castle Inc.’s share was trading at $91.79 as of June 8th. CCI’s trailing and forward P/E were 39.87 and 30.67 respectively according to […]
